name: Jutawan Seribu Ringgit
overview:
"Did you ever really love me?"

A hardworking delivery rider strives to give his girlfriend a better life, only to discover that she has been keeping secrets from him! Just as his world falls apart, fate presents him with an unexpected opportunity for a comeback. But is this truly a stroke of luck, or something else entirely?
